rationale: The citing paper’s stated gap is moving beyond prior RFID/path or field-of-view video approaches to direct SKU-level eye-tracking, and the cited 2013 JMR paper is exactly a wearable in-store video-tracking study of consideration and conversion in grocery shopping. This strong methodological and conceptual overlap suggests the cited work is likely a substantive prior-method/foundation reference rather than an incidental mention; the DOI match is exact (10.1509/jmr.12.0065).
